title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Cipla Global Group

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Medical Officer at Cipla Global Group
jsonLd.description:
We at Cipla Global Group are looking for an experienced Medical Officer based out of Delhi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Cipla Global Group:
Cipla Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Telemedicine

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cipla Global Group!
